name: SAM Check Cashing Machine
description_short: SAM Check Cashing Machine offers check cashing and financial services at a Detroit-area location with extended hours (8am-9pm weekdays).
description_long: SAM Check Cashing Machine operates a physical check-cashing location in Detroit, Michigan, serving the local community's immediate financial transaction needs. The business is positioned as a check-cashing and money services provider, operating from 20250 Seven Mile W in Detroit's 48219 zip code. Based on available information, SAM Check Cashing Machine functions as a traditional check-cashing storefront, providing quick access to funds without requiring bank accounts or credit checks—a critical service for unbanked and underbanked populations. The company maintains a dedicated phone line and online location directory, suggesting multiple locations or franchise operations under the SAM brand. Operating hours span 8am to 9pm on weekdays and 8am to 7pm on Sundays, positioning the business to serve customers outside standard banking hours. What distinguishes SAM Check Cashing Machine is its extended operating hours, particularly evening access until 9pm on weekdays, which accommodates working individuals unable to visit traditional banks during standard business hours. The company maintains an online presence with a dedicated locations page, indicating organizational infrastructure beyond a single storefront. However, detailed information about specific fees, services beyond check cashing, competitive rates, or regulatory compliance is not available from the provided website content. Consumers should verify current fee structures, accepted check types, and maximum check amounts before visiting, as these details are standard considerations for check-cashing services but not disclosed in available materials.
pros: Extended weekday hours until 9pm, accommodating working customers outside standard banking hours
Sunday operations until 7pm, providing weekend check-cashing access
Consistent daily operating hours (8am opening time across all days)
Multiple locations indicated via online directory, suggesting local accessibility
Local Detroit presence serving the community for check-cashing needs
Direct phone contact available for customer service inquiries
cons: No fee structure or rate information available on provided website materials
Limited service details disclosed—specific products beyond check cashing unclear
No information about accepted check types or transaction limits
Physical location-dependent service with no indication of remote check deposit options
Website content lacks details on regulatory licenses or consumer protections
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked individuals needing same-day check access
Working professionals unable to visit banks during standard 9-5 hours
Detroit-area residents seeking convenient evening or weekend check cashing
diagnosis: SAM Check Cashing Machine is best for Detroit-area residents and workers who need check-cashing services outside traditional banking hours, particularly those without bank accounts. The main caveat is that specific fees, service terms, and product details are not publicly available online, requiring direct customer contact to assess competitive positioning.
